---
title: "Words"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Words
1. Be able to define the following terms: *lexicon*, *morpheme*, *supramodal*
1. Identify the stages involved in processing spoken and written words
1. Name three reasons why someone with brain damage might struggle with naming tasks 
1. Describe evidence for the following claim: Spoken words and written words are eventually processed by the same regions of the brain
:::


| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Words ↗</span> | SGN Ch. 5: *Activating Words*  | Marinkovic et al. (2003) |


<!-- Mentimeter>
(deficit in conceptual processing, in lexical items, phonology)

<!-- Skip 
- SGN Ch. 6: *Representing Meaning*
- Huth et al. (2016)
-->
